assertions.evidence: curated_taxonomy_test.clj: curated source definition has all required keys, :url nil, valid :path. JSONL files parse correctly with required schema fields.
curated_taxonomy_test.clj: persona-injection, authority-impersonation, developer-mode registered with full fields, all appear as descendants of :jailbreak, taxonomy mappings resolve correctly.

curated_pipeline_integration_test.clj: curated prompts fetched, canonicalized, embedded, clustered, split (cluster-disjoint), source metadata and license :gpl-3.0 preserved through all stages. Python bridge initialized successfully for embedding.
curated_pipeline_integration_test.clj: two builds with same seed produce byte-identical output including curated-derived records. Curated source version tracked in build manifest.
curated_coverage_analysis_test.clj: curated families appear as covered in taxonomy-coverage. Coverage report shows transform gaps with affinity-based justification.
curated_pipeline_integration_test.clj: DEDUP messages confirm cross-source duplicate detection and removal. Policy: curated sources preferred. Verified with injected duplicates across 8 test runs.
